headline: A Look At T. Rowe Price Group (TROW) Valuation After February Outflows And New Emerging Markets ETF Launch
summary: T. Rowe Price Group (TROW) is back in focus after reporting February net outflows of $5.3b and launching its Emerging Markets Equity Research ETF, a product expansion that arrives as investors reassess the stock. See our latest analysis for T. Rowe Price Group. At a share price of $88.59, T. Rowe Price has seen a 14.5% decline in its 90 day share price return and a 15.33% decline year to date.
